detectors.description:
Reentrancy in ForeverNEver._transfer(address,address,uint256) (ForeverNEver.sol#441-505):
	External calls:
	- swapTokensForEth(contractTokenBalance) (ForeverNEver.sol#487)
		- uniswapV2Router.swapExactTokensForETHSupportingFeeOnTransferTokens(tokenAmount,0,path,address(this),block.timestamp) (ForeverNEver.sol#519-531)
	External calls sending eth:
	- sendETHToFee(address(this).balance) (ForeverNEver.sol#493)
		- _feeAddrWallet.transfer(amount) (ForeverNEver.sol#569)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- _tokenTransfer(from,to,amount) (ForeverNEver.sol#503)
		- _rOwned[address(this)] = _rOwned[address(this)].add(rTeam) (ForeverNEver.sol#657)
		- _rOwned[sender] = _rOwned[sender].sub(rAmount) (ForeverNEver.sol#637)
		- _rOwned[recipient] = _rOwned[recipient].add(rTransferAmount) (ForeverNEver.sol#639)
	ForeverNEver._rOwned (ForeverNEver.sol#241) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- ForeverNEver._takeTeam(uint256) (ForeverNEver.sol#651-659)
	- ForeverNEver._transferStandard(address,address,uint256) (ForeverNEver.sol#633-647)
	- ForeverNEver.balanceOf(address) (ForeverNEver.sol#359-363)
	- ForeverNEver.constructor() (ForeverNEver.sol#309-323)
	- _tokenTransfer(from,to,amount) (ForeverNEver.sol#503)
		- _rTotal = _rTotal.sub(rFee) (ForeverNEver.sol#665)
	ForeverNEver._rTotal (ForeverNEver.sol#257) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- ForeverNEver._getCurrentSupply() (ForeverNEver.sol#757-767)
	- ForeverNEver._reflectFee(uint256,uint256) (ForeverNEver.sol#663-669)
	- ForeverNEver.constructor() (ForeverNEver.sol#309-323)
	- ForeverNEver.tokenFromReflection(uint256) (ForeverNEver.sol#415-423)

detectors.description:

	- uniswapV2Router.addLiquidityETH{value: address(this).balance}(address(this),balanceOf(address(this)),0,0,owner(),block.timestamp) (ForeverNEver.sol#587)
	External calls sending eth:
	- uniswapV2Router.addLiquidityETH{value: address(this).balance}(address(this),balanceOf(address(this)),0,0,owner(),block.timestamp) (ForeverNEver.sol#587)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- tradingOpen = true (ForeverNEver.sol#597)
	ForeverNEver.tradingOpen (ForeverNEver.sol#283) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- ForeverNEver.openTrading() (ForeverNEver.sol#575-601)
